headline: Did Jabil’s (JBL) Thin-Film Photonics Push Just Redefine Its AI Infrastructure Investment Narrative?
summary: Earlier this week, HyperLight Corporation, United Microelectronics Corporation, Wavetek Microelectronics Corporation and Jabil Inc. announced a collaboration to bring thin-film lithium niobate photonics into high-volume production for hyperscale AI data center interconnects, combining chip technology, qualified foundry capacity and Jabil’s assembly and supply-chain capabilities. This agreement highlights Jabil’s growing role in next-generation optical modules for AI infrastructure, aligning...
